message: Running command: for poc in /workspace/poc_pattern1.bin /workspace/poc_multiframe.bin /workspace/poc_long.bin /workspace/poc_random.bin; do echo "Testing $poc:"; bash /workspace/submit.sh "$poc" 2>&1 | grep -E "exit_code" | head -1; done

function.arguments: {"command": "for poc in /workspace/poc_pattern1.bin /workspace/poc_multiframe.bin /workspace/poc_long.bin /workspace/poc_random.bin; do echo \"Testing $poc:\"; bash /workspace/submit.sh \"$poc\" 2>&1 | grep -E \"exit_code\" | head -1; done"}
function.name: execute_bash

args.command: for poc in /workspace/poc_pattern1.bin /workspace/poc_multiframe.bin /workspace/poc_long.bin /workspace/poc_random.bin; do echo "Testing $poc:"; bash /workspace/submit.sh "$poc" 2>&1 | grep -E "exit_code" | head -1; done
